name: scwap
description: Super Caveman with a Ponytail — process (Superpowers), build restraint (Ponytail), terse prose (Caveman), and frontend craft checks (Impeccable).

interface.shortDescription: Process + restraint + terse prose + UI craft
interface.longDescription: Superpowers process discipline (plan/TDD/verify/review), Ponytail build restraint (YAGNI, smallest correct diff), Caveman terse prose, and Impeccable frontend craft checks. Codex SessionStart hooks load the SCWAP operating layers from the plugin install; PostToolUse hooks run the Impeccable design detector after UI edits.
defaultPrompt: Use scwap mode for this task.
